name: O'henry Bars
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 300°F. Mix all ingredients except chocolate chips and peanut butter in a bowl until combined. Press into a lightly greased 11x13" pan. Bake no more than 12 minutes. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly; it will be soft and runny when removed, but will set as it cools. For topping, melt chocolate chips and peanut butter together and spread evenly over the bars. Allow to chill until the chocolate is set.
